# Transcrição: 3. Trait 2 - Great Salespeople treat each customer with a high level of customer service (1 customer at a time).

- **Fonte:** 3. Trait 2 - Great Salespeople treat each customer with a high level of customer service (1 customer at a time).
- **Duração:** 00:54
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:54]

The great salespeople know they have to build their business one customer at a time through customer service. That's right one customer at a time. Not a whole bunch of them but treat each customer individually. The reality is look you're in the people business. Every client is important. Every client is valuable. Some you can help more than others but they're all important. The way to build your business is through support, customer service, taking care, going the extra mile. Anything you need. What can I do for you? How are things going? These are the questions the greats ask their customers so they can figure out how to continue to support and assist that customer. Stay in contact. There's no such thing as too much support, too much service. These customers are valuable. This is how you build your business and you do it one customer at a time.
